title: Solving the Problem of Parents Telling Stories! Meta Tests AI Bedtime Story App StoryKit
excerpt: Designed to ease the burden on busy parents, tech giant Meta is currently piloting an AI app called StoryKit. The app, tailored for children, can quickly genera
content_html:
Designed to ease the burden on busy parents, tech giant Meta is currently piloting an AI app called StoryKit. The app, tailored for children, can quickly generate personalized bedtime stories with custom characters, scenes, and music.

Parents don't even need to create content themselves; they just need to upload photos of their child's favorite toys to generate vivid characters. Additionally, the app supports incorporating educational themes such as bravery and kindness, allowing children to naturally absorb positive values while listening to stories.

Focused on safety control, emphasizing a non-social environment

Meta has confirmed that the app is currently being tested in certain areas to evaluate the real user experience of parents. To ensure children's safety, StoryKit has strict AI safety filters, no social features, and is only for adults.

Compared to some previous AI products that sparked controversy, StoryKit aims to provide parents with a convenient tool for bedtime stories in the digital age. Even if children come up with extremely creative and unusual story requests, the AI can quickly provide a complete script.

Will AI replace parent-child interaction? Sparking discussions on humanities

However, this new application has also sparked discussions and reflections on "outsourcing family time." Traditionally, creating and telling bedtime stories by hand is an important bond for strengthening family relationships.

While AI tools greatly facilitate daily life, it remains unknown whether scripts generated by algorithms will weaken human imagination. How to maintain warm human connections while enjoying the convenience of technology has become a new challenge for many parents.

sentences.en: How to maintain warm human connections while enjoying the convenience of technology has become a new challenge for many parents.
sentences.zh: 如何在享受科技便利的同时，保持温暖的人际联系，成为许多家长面临的新挑战。

content_html_zh:
为了减轻忙碌父母的负担，科技巨头 Meta 目前正在试用一款名为 StoryKit 的人工智能应用程序。 该应用程序专为儿童量身定制，可以快速生成包含自定义人物、场景和音乐的个性化睡前故事。

家长甚至不需要自己创建内容；他们只需上传孩子最喜欢的玩具的照片即可生成生动的角色。 此外，该应用还支持融入勇敢、善良等教育主题，让孩子在听故事的同时自然吸收积极的价值观。

注重安全控制，强调非社会环境

Meta已确认该应用目前正在某些领域进行测试，以评估家长的真实用户体验。 为了确保儿童的安全，StoryKit具有严格的AI安全过滤器，没有社交功能，并且仅适用于成人。

相比之前一些引发争议的AI产品，StoryKit旨在为家长提供数字时代睡前故事的便捷工具。 即使孩子们提出了极具创意和不寻常的故事要求，人工智能也能快速提供完整的剧本。

AI会取代亲子互动吗？ 引发人文讨论

不过，这个新应用也引发了人们对“外包家庭时间”的讨论和反思。 传统上，亲手创作和讲述睡前故事是加强家庭关系的重要纽带。

虽然人工智能工具极大地方便了日常生活，但算法生成的脚本是否会削弱人类的想象力仍不得而知。 如何在享受科技便利的同时，保持温暖的人际联系，成为许多家长面临的新挑战。
